compiled_state.title: Contract: approach-decision-maker evaluation output schema
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md defining the structured output contract for the approach-decision-maker agent.

**Sections**:
- Signal Name: APPROACH_DECISION
- Emitter: dso:approach-decision-maker agent (plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md)
- Parser: /dso:implementation-plan SKILL.md (resolution loop in Story 4acd-215a)
- Fields: Two output modes — (a) selection with ADR-style rationale (Context, Decision, Consequences, selected_proposal_index), (b) counter-proposal with same done definitions satisfied
- Example: Representative JSON payloads for both modes

This is the interface contract between the decision-maker agent and the implementation-plan skill. Shared by Stories a1f3-db49 (emitter) and 4acd-215a (parser).

**Unit test exemption**: No conditional logic (pure interface specification), change-detector-only, infrastructure-boundary. Contract validated at integration time when both emitter and parser are implemented.

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] File exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md
- [ ] Contains Signal Name section
  Verify: grep -q "Signal Name" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md
- [ ] Contains Emitter and Parser sections
  Verify: grep -q "Emitter" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md && grep -q "Parser" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md
- [ ] Contains Fields section with both output modes
  Verify: grep -q "selection\|counter.proposal" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md
- [ ] Contains Example payload
  Verify: grep -q "Example" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/approach-decision-output.md
